title: Bingotopia
description: A modpack that enhances performance, visuals, and quality of life for the Bingo game mode, while staying true to vanilla gameplay experience.
body:
![Image showing the name of the project, "Bingotopia", accompanied by the subtitle "The Definitive Bingo".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0afa4fcedb57210ffe5060226c49319561120d70.png)

A modpack designed to enhance the gaming experience of **"Yet Another Bingo"** through a curated set of mods that improve performance, add visual enhancements and quality of life improvements, while remaining faithful to the original gameplay experience.

## ⭐ Core Mods

- [Yet Another Bingo](https://modrinth.com/mod/mHeNceaH) by fennifith
  - The heart of the modpack, it adds the Bingo game mode, lobby, and all its associated mechanics.
- [Scoreboard Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/2YIQkF2v) by fennifith
  - Improves the clarity and presentation of the Bingo scoreboard, making progress tracking easier and more readable during matches.
- [Spectators Generate Loot](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcDkcojp) by fennifith
  - Allows you to view ungenerated chests in spectator mode once the Bingo match has ended, without having to switch modes.
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/k2ZPuTBm)
  - It allows you to play multiplayer comfortably and easily. You can invite your friends and play together without the need for complicated server setups.
- [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/u6dRKJwZ) by mezz
  - Allows players to quickly view crafting recipes and item information, which is especially useful when checking Bingo cards using the default ⌨ **Y** key.

# 📖 How to play

In the lower left corner of the title screen, you should see a **"BINGO!"** button. Clicking it will directly launch a world with a lobby to set up and start a bingo match.

![“BINGO!” button in the bottom right of the Minecraft title screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb3c76f0c196fc3c84f0151334e1a519b408278f.jpeg)
 
> **Tip:** Press the ⌨ **Y** key to see the bingo card in an inventory view.

![Bingo Card in an inventory view.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40fe67cc675fb83af01add87dd34e8b1ef7dce6.jpeg)

**To find out more about the "Yet Another Bingo" mod, visit the official project [Wiki](https://horrific.dev/bingo/what-is-bingo/).**
